hero.sub: Tell us what's happening — we'll instantly match you with government health and welfare schemes you may be eligible for, in plain language.
hero.note: No jargon. No paperwork. Just help.
how.title: How it works
how.sub: Three simple steps — takes less than 2 minutes
how.step1.title: Sign up
how.step1.desc: Create a free account with your email and a few basic details about your location and income.
how.step2.title: Describe your situation
how.step2.desc: Tell us in plain language what's happening — a diagnosis, an accident, a financial hardship. You can also upload a medical document.
how.step3.title: Get matched
how.step3.desc: We surface the schemes most relevant to you, explain why you may qualify, and give you a checklist of documents to apply.
